title: Aranet RSSI Trending for Mesh Radio Health
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-7d
| eval rssi=tonumber(coalesce(rssi_dbm, rssi, ""))
| where isnotnull(rssi)
| timechart span=1h median(rssi) by sensor_id
description: Falling RSSI precedes packet loss in mesh deployments; early move or repeater planning avoids offline spikes.
implementation: (1) Baseline per sensor. (2) Alert on 10 dB drop week over week. (3) Map AP/gateway placement.
visualization: Line chart median RSSI; alert overlay.
grandmaExplanation: We watch wireless signal strength so sensors stay connected.
